subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1915-04-10
subcodes.first_line: The staff of life is bread. All other things are comparatively non-essential. Let us pray that the wheat fields may be saved
subcodes.subjects: @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @moderation; frugality; simplicity, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
